# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[concat('sqlserver-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Server
  databaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-appdb
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Database
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  sqlAdministratorLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladmin
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login
  sqlAdministratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: AzureSQL2024!
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator password
  databaseEdition:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
      - Premium
    metadata:
      description: SQL Database edition
  databaseServiceObjective:
    type: string
    defaultValue: S1
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - S2
      - S3
      - P1
      - P2
      - P4
    metadata:
      description: SQL Database service objective
  devIpAddresses:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - 203.0.113.10
      - 203.0.113.20
      - 203.0.113.30
    metadata:
      description: List of development IP addresses to allow
variables:
  firewallRules: [
    {
      name: AllowAllAzureServices
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
    },
    {
      name: DevIP-1
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[0]]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[0]]"
    },
    {
      name: DevIP-2
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[1]]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[1]]"
    },
    {
      name: DevIP-3
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[2]]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[2]]"
    }
  ]
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: staging
      purpose: development-testing
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: '12.0'
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      minimalTlsVersion: '1.2'
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: staging
      purpose: development-testing
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('databaseServiceObjective')]"
      tier: "[parameters('databaseEdition')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: 268435456000
      catalogCollation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', variables('firewallRules')[copyIndex()].name)]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    copy:
      name: firewallRulesCopy
      count: "[length(variables('firewallRules'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[variables('firewallRules')[copyIndex()].startIpAddress]"
      endIpAddress: "[variables('firewallRules')[copyIndex()].endIpAddress]"
outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
  connectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('databaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
